problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
